ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Pratik,

We hope you are enjoying the features of our SaaS platform. This email is to inform you that your current subscription plan is set to renew on 15th May 2026.

Plan Details:
• Plan: Premium Plus
• Amount: ₹1,200 per month
• Billing Cycle: Monthly

Please review your account settings and confirm the renewal preferences. If you wish to change the plan or update your payment method, you can do so in your account dashboard.

If no action is taken, the renewal will proceed automatically on 15th May and the service will continue uninterrupted.

Thank you for choosing our platform. Let us know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Customer Success Team
[Company Name]

spam.subject: URGENT: QuickBooks Invoice #QBI-56789 Requires Immediate Payment
spam.body:
Dear Pratik,

We have detected an outstanding invoice for your QuickBooks subscription. The invoice amount is ₹9,999 and it is overdue by 3 days.

To avoid interruption of your accounting services, please complete the payment within the next 48 hours. Failure to do so may result in suspension of your QuickBooks account and loss of access to critical financial data.

Secure Payment Link: <URL>

If you believe this is a mistake or have already paid, please reply to this email with your transaction reference number.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
QuickBooks Billing Support
